purpose: Highlight tutorial UI polish and QA routes
assetPolicy: Reuse existing formal UI assets; no new raster game assets generated.

reusedAssets.reason: A13b.2 simple tutorial-specific text panel with only an outer frame and no text ornament.
Compact option button frame matches the current settings UI.
Small update badge works as a step counter chip without text baked into the image.

highlightImplementation.overlay: Four dark rectangles create a spotlight hole around the target rect.
highlightImplementation.tooltip: Panel auto-places above or below the target and clamps to screen safe area.
highlightImplementation.fallback: Centered panel is used when target bounds are unavailable.

qaNotes: Options tutorial action resets tutorial flags and opens Home tutorial again.
Play tutorial pauses gameplay without showing the pause menu.
Level-up tutorial can be forced from URL for repeatable QA.
